introSection: Monster Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster that operated at Playland for an unknown amount of time before being relocated to Oaks Amusement Park, where it operated from 1977 to 1994. It was replaced by the Looping Thunder.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * A page with a photo of the roller coaster

fullText:
Monster Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster that operated at Playland for an unknown amount of time before being relocated to Oaks Amusement Park, where it operated from 1977 to 1994. It was replaced by the Looping Thunder.


 * A page with a photo of the roller coaster
